title: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Offering short-term training and certification of prior learning for unemployed youth.
benefits: Free skill training, certification, and reward for successful candidates.

title: Prime Minister’s Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Financial assistance to set up micro-enterprises in non-farm sectors.
benefits: Bank-connected subsidy of 15% to 35% on project cost.

title: National Career Service (NCS) Portal
description: ICT-based portal that provides a wide range of employment-related services.
benefits: Job matching, career counseling, and vocational guidance.

title: ASEEM (Aatmanirbhar Skilled Employee Employer Mapping)
description: AI-based platform to match skilled people with available jobs.
benefits: Direct access to job opportunities based on skill sets.

title: DDU-GKY (Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana)
description: Skill training and placement program exclusively for rural youth.
benefits: Free training, uniform, books, and guaranteed placement support.

title: PM-DAKSH Yojana
description: Skill development for Scheduled Castes, Backward Classes, and Safai Karamcharis.
benefits: Upskilling, short-term and long-term training with stipend.

title: STRIVE (Skills Strengthening for Industrial Value Enhancement)
description: Improving the relevance and efficiency of ITIs in India.
benefits: Upgraded training facilities and better industry linkages.

title: SANKALP Scheme
description: Strengthening institutional mechanisms for skill development at district and state levels.
benefits: Better access to decentralized skill training programs.

title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
description: Promoting apprenticeship training and increasing engagement of apprentices.
benefits: Sharing of 25% of prescribed stipend subject to a max of ₹1,500/month.

title: Jan Shikshan Sansthan (JSS)
description: Vocational training for non-literates, neo-literates, and school dropouts in rural/urban slums.
benefits: Skill training in local trades to improve self-reliance.

title: PM Kaushal Kendra (PMKK)
description: State-of-the-art Model Training Centres (MTCs) in every district.
benefits: High-quality vocational training with standardized equipment.

title: National SC-ST Hub (NSSH)
description: Building an ecosystem to support SC/ST entrepreneurs.
benefits: Professional support and handholding for participating in public procurement.

title: SAMRATH (Textile Skill Development)
description: Skill development program in the textile sector.
benefits: Assistance for skill development in spinning, weaving, and garmenting.

title: Self-Employment Lending (OBC/EBC)
description: Credit for starting small businesses for Backward Classes.
benefits: Low-interest loans up to ₹5 lakh for self-employment.

title: Credit Guarantee for Micro Units (CGFMU)
description: Guarantee for loans extended under MUDRAn Yojana.
benefits: Ensures bank confidence in lending to first-time entrepreneurs.

title: Yuva Nidhi Scheme
description: Monthly allowance for unemployed graduates and diploma holders of the state.
benefits: ₹3,000 (Degree) or ₹1,500 (Diploma) per month for up to 24 months.

title: Chief Minister’s Kaushalya Karnataka (CMKKY)
description: Flagship vocational training scheme of Karnataka Govt.
benefits: Free certification and training in hundreds of job roles.

title: CMEGP (Self-Employment Generation)
description: Loan-cum-subsidy for unemployed youth to start small industries.
benefits: Subsidy ranging from 25% to 35% on projects up to ₹25 lakh.

title: Dr. Ambedkar Swavalambana Yojana
description: Individual self-employment loans for SC community members.
benefits: Small loans with 50% subsidy for income-generating activities.

title: Samriddhi (Franchise-based Entrepreneurship)
description: Supporting SC/ST youth to become business owners via franchises.
benefits: Grant of up to ₹10 lakh to set up franchise of reputed brands.

title: KSTDC Tourist Taxi Scheme
description: Empowering unemployed youth by helping them buy tourist taxis.
benefits: Subsidy of ₹3 lakh for purchase of car or taxi.

title: Devaraj Urs Development Corporation Startup Loan
description: Start-up capital for Backward Classes (OBC) youth.
benefits: Loan of ₹1-2 lakh with back-end subsidy.

title: Kayaka (SHG Enterprise Support)
description: Supporting SHG members to migrate from wage labor to small units.
benefits: Zero-interest loans up to ₹5 lakh for SHG federations.

title: Badavara Bandhu (Zero Interest Loan for Start)
description: Small interest-free capital for starting micro-vending trades.
benefits: Interest-free daily/weekly loans for small traders.

title: Minority Development Corporation Self-Employment Scheme
description: Loan and subsidy for minority youth for diverse businesses.
benefits: Loan of ₹2 lakh with 50% subsidy components.

title: Ambedkar Self Employment for Physically Challenged
description: Tailored loans for differently-abled individuals to start shops.
benefits: Loan with 50% subsidy and low-interest rates.

title: Elevate (Startup Grants for Women/Tier-2)
description: Grants for startups from small towns or women-led teams.
benefits: Grants up to ₹50 lakh for innovation and commercialization.

title: Unnati (Social Innovation Grants)
description: Matching grant-in-aid for SC/ST innovators/entrepreneurs.
benefits: Financial support of up to ₹50 lakh for social impact products.

title: Suvarna Kayaka
description: One-time technical training for youth in rural areas.
benefits: Free technical course and toolkit distribution.

title: Madiwala Development Corporation Loan
description: Financial assistance for washing, ironing, and drying trades.
benefits: Direct loan with subsidy for laundry equipment.
